mapper.insert: INSERT INTO document_version (id, document_id, version_number, title, content, summary, keywords, change_log, created_by, create_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{documentId}, #{versionNumber}, #{title}, #{content}, #{summary}, #{keywords}, #{changeLog}, #{createdBy}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM document_version WHERE document_id = #{documentId} ORDER BY version_number DESC
SELECT * FROM document_version WHERE document_id = #{documentId} ORDER BY version_number DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(version_number), 0) FROM document_version WHERE document_id = #{documentId}
